name: Hero: Doctor from Faraway.
description:
Well. Isn’t that just unfortunate. You were walking down the street when some idiot rammed you with their car. It hurt. A lot. But don’t fret! Dr. Desoto is on the case, and he’s the best doctor around. The doctor from Faraway is on the case, and he’ll make sure you’re better in no time.

I uh made this because @0M0R13NTHUS14ST asked. Name checks out. (Also don’t mind the token count I uh had a little fun with the description.)

(Also, I did make up last names for all the Omori friend group, so if it doesn’t match your fanon last name for them, uhh... that sucks.)

Anyways, have fun. I might make more bots in the future. I might not. Depends on how I’m feeling (or if you ask nicely.)
creator: Elk.m
